metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Web Session ASIM filtering parser for AWS Web Application Firewall
properties.query:
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null),
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    url_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    httpuseragent_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventresultdetails_in: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventresult: string='*',
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false
)
{
  //According to AWS documentation: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/waf/latest/developerguide/logging-fields.html
  let ActionLookup = datatable(Action:string, DvcAction:string, EventResult:string, EventSeverity:string)
  [
      'ALLOW',     'Allow', 'Success', 'Informational',
      'BLOCK',     'Deny',  'Failure', 'Low',
      'CAPTCHA',   'Deny',  'Failure', 'Low',
      'CHALLENGE', 'Deny',  'Failure', 'Low',
      '',          '',      'NA',      'Informational'
  ];
  AWSWAF
  | where not(disabled)
  | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
      and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
  //Mandatory common fields
  | extend
      EventCount = int(1),
      EventStartTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventEndTime = TimeGenerated,
      EventType = 'HTTPsession',
      EventVendor = 'AWS',
      EventProduct = 'AWS WAF',
      EventSchema = 'WebSession',
      EventSchemaVersion = '0.2.7'
  | extend Dvc = coalesce(WebAclId, strcat(EventVendor, '/', EventProduct))
  | lookup ActionLookup on Action
  | where (eventresult == '*' or EventResult =~ eventresult)
  //Recommended common fields
  | extend DvcId = Dvc,
          DvcIdType = 'Other',
          EventUid = _ItemId
  | project-rename DvcOriginalAction = Action
  // AWS WAF populates ResponseCodeSent only when a custom block response is configured; the field is empty for allowed requests and default-response blocks.
  | extend EventResultDetails = tostring(ResponseCodeSent)
  | where (array_length(eventresultdetails_in) == 0 or EventResultDetails in (eventresultdetails_in))
  | extend HttpStatusCode = EventResultDetails
  //HTTP session fields
  | extend parsedRequest = parse_json(HttpRequest)
  | extend headers = iff(array_length(parsedRequest.headers) > 0, parsedRequest.headers, dynamic([{}]))
  | mv-apply header = headers on (
      summarize
          HttpHost = take_anyif(tostring(header.value), tostring(header.name) =~ 'host'),
          HttpUserAgent = take_anyif(tostring(header.value), tostring(header.name) =~ 'user-agent'),
          HttpReferrer = take_anyif(tostring(header.value), tostring(header.name) =~ 'referer'),
          HttpCookie = take_anyif(tostring(header.value), tostring(header.name) =~ 'Cookie'),
          HttpRequestXff = take_anyif(tostring(header.value), tostring(header.name) =~ 'X-Forwarded-For')
      )
  | where (array_length(httpuseragent_has_any) == 0 or HttpUserAgent has_any (httpuseragent_has_any))
  | extend
      scheme = tostring(parsedRequest.scheme),
      host = coalesce(tostring(parsedRequest.host), HttpHost),
      uri = tostring(parsedRequest.uri),
      args = tostring(parsedRequest.args)
  | extend Url = case(
                  isnotempty(scheme) and isnotempty(host),
                  strcat(scheme, '://', host, uri, iff(isnotempty(args), strcat('?', args), '')),
                  isnotempty(host),
                  strcat(host, uri, iff(isnotempty(args), strcat('?', args), '')),
                  uri
              ),
          HttpVersion = tostring(parsedRequest.httpVersion),
          HttpRequestMethod = tostring(parsedRequest.httpMethod),
          HttpRequestHeaderCount = toint(array_length(parsedRequest.headers)),
          UserAgent = HttpUserAgent
  | where (array_length(url_has_any) == 0 or Url has_any (url_has_any))
  //Network session fields
  | extend NetworkApplicationProtocol = toupper(scheme),
          NetworkSessionId = tostring(parsedRequest.requestId)
  //Network destination fields
  | project-rename DstDvcId = HttpSourceId
  | extend DstDvcIdType = 'Other',
           DstPortNumber = case(
              scheme =~ 'https', toint(443),
              scheme =~ 'http', toint(80),
              int(null)
          )
  //Checking on host-header injection, IPv4, IPv6
  | extend hostIsClean = host matches regex @'^[A-Za-z0-9\.\-\:\[\]_]+$'
  | extend hostIsIp = hostIsClean and (host matches regex @'^\d{1,3}(\.\d{1,3}){3}$' or host contains ':')
  | extend hostHasDomain = hostIsClean and not(hostIsIp) and array_length(split(host, '.')) > 1
  | extend
      DstIpAddr   = iff(isnotnull(parse_ipv4(host)), host, ''),
      DstHostname = case(
          isnotnull(parse_ipv4(host)), host,
          hostIsIp, '',
          hostIsClean, tostring(split(host, '.')[0]),
          ''
      ),
      DstFQDN     = iff(hostHasDomain, host, ''),
      DstDomain   = iff(hostHasDomain, strcat_array(array_slice(split(host, '.'), 1, -1), '.'), '')
  | extend DstDomainType = iff(isnotempty(DstDomain), 'FQDN', '')
  //Network Source fields
  | extend SrcIpAddr = tostring(parsedRequest.clientIp),
          Src = tostring(parsedRequest.clientIp),
          SrcGeoCountry = tostring(parsedRequest.country)
  | where (array_length(srcipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(SrcIpAddr, srcipaddr_has_any_prefix))
  | where (array_length(ipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0 or has_any_ipv4_prefix(SrcIpAddr, ipaddr_has_any_prefix))
  //Network Inspection fields
  | project-rename RuleName = TerminatingRuleId
  //Additional, non-normalized fields
  | extend AdditionalFields = iff(
          pack,
          bag_pack(
              'HttpSourceName', HttpSourceName,
              'TerminatingRuleType', TerminatingRuleType,
              'TerminatingRuleMatchDetails', TerminatingRuleMatchDetails,
              'RuleGroupList', RuleGroupList,
              'RateBasedRuleList', RateBasedRuleList,
              'Labels', Labels,
              'JA3', Ja3Fingerprint
          ),
          dynamic({})
      )
  //Aliases
  | extend
      IpAddr   = SrcIpAddr,
      Hostname = DstHostname,
      Dst      = DstDvcId,
      EventOriginalUid = NetworkSessionId,
      SessionId = NetworkSessionId,
      Rule = RuleName
  //Select fields
  | project
      // -- Mandatory
      TimeGenerated,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventType,
      EventResult,
      EventProduct,
      EventVendor,
      EventSchema,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      Dvc,
      Url,
      Dst,
      // -- Recommended
      EventResultDetails,
      EventSeverity,
      EventUid,
      DvcAction,
      DvcOriginalAction,
      DvcId,
      DvcIdType,
      HttpRequestMethod,
      HttpStatusCode,
      DstHostname,
      SrcIpAddr,
      ASimMatchingIpAddr = "SrcIpAddr",
      ASimMatchingHostname = "DstHostname",
      // -- Event optional
      EventOriginalUid,
      // -- HTTP optional
      HttpVersion,
      HttpRequestHeaderCount,
      HttpHost,
      HttpUserAgent,
      HttpReferrer,
      HttpCookie,
      HttpRequestXff,
      // -- Destination optional
      DstDvcId,
      DstDvcIdType,
      DstIpAddr,
      DstPortNumber,
      DstFQDN,
      DstDomain,
      DstDomainType,
      // -- Source optional
      SrcGeoCountry,
      // -- Network fields
      NetworkApplicationProtocol,
      NetworkSessionId,
      // -- Inspection fields
      RuleName,
      Rule,
      // -- Additional
      AdditionalFields,
      // -- Aliases
      IpAddr,
      UserAgent,
      Hostname,
      SessionId,
      Src,
      // -- Source table
      Type
};
parser(
    starttime=starttime,
    endtime=endtime,
    srcipaddr_has_any_prefix=srcipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix=ipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    url_has_any=url_has_any,
    httpuseragent_has_any=httpuseragent_has_any,
    eventresultdetails_in=eventresultdetails_in,
    eventresult=eventresult,
    disabled=disabled,
    pack=pack
)
